header.pageDescription: This page is displayed when user accesses any folder on your WebDAV server in a web browser. You can customize this page to your needs.
header.testYourServerDescription: To test your WebDAV server you can run Ajax integration tests right from this page.
header.mountWebDAVDriveDescription: Install WebDAV Drive to manage files in OS File Manager and open documents for editing.

downloadDrive.signedWithCertificate: Your {appName} is signed with a development certificate.
downloadDrive.forTestingDescription: To install the application for testing purposes download zip archive and run the "Install.ps1".
downloadDrive.forProductionDescription: To deploy the application in production environment use the Package and Publish in your Drive project context menu.

modals.copyConflictMessage: The following item(s) already exist in the target folder: {names}. Do you want to overwrite them?
modals.renameMessage: Are you sure want to rename selected items?
modals.deleteMessage: Are you sure want to delete selected items?
modals.printMessage: Are you sure want to print selected items?

editWithDesctopApp.title: Edit document with desktop associated application.

selectDesctopApp.title: Select application to open this file with.

validations.followingItemExist: The following item(s) exist on the server
validations.notSupportSearch: The server does not support search
validations.notContainFollowingCharacters: The name cannot contain any of the following characters
validations.cannotCopyParentToChild: Cannot copy parent folder into child
validations.cannotMoveParentToChild: Cannot move parent folder into child

downloadProtocol.installCustomProtocol: To open this document, you must install a custom protocol on a client machine and enable a web browser extension.
downloadProtocol.downloadAndInstallFiles: Download and install the file below
downloadProtocol.enableITHitEditDocumentOpener: (Optional) Enable the IT Hit Edit Document Opener web browser extension
downloadProtocol.notRequiredForInternetExplorer: The extension is not required for Internet Explorer
downloadProtocol.installAndVerifyExtensions: how to install and verify web browser extensions

errors.cutItemsSameNameErrorMessage: The source and destination file names are the same.
errors.failedCheckExistsErrorMessage: Check for already exists item failed with error.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your connection.
errors.notFound: The requested item could not be found.
errors.permissionError: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
